name: yusufkaracaburun
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace by yusufkaracaburun — catalog of skill/plugin bundles for the agile lifecycle and beyond.

plugins.name: ai
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic agile lifecycle for Claude Code + Cursor — 30 skills (setup, ship, tdd, retro, should-i-use, phase, …), 3 subagents (explore, reviewer, qa-runner), 10 slash commands (/ai:doctor, /ai:dedupe, /ai:which, /ai:status, /ai:no-globals, /ai:upgrade, /ai:next, /ai:prefer-plugin, /ai:hygiene, /ai:phase), and a PostToolUse skill-logging hook (opt-in). Tracks ai-kit master — every release ships to /plugin update automatically.
